---
title: "Final DFD Analysis"
author: "Britt"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---






```{r}
# Ensure levels are set correctly
sample.description$Myco <- relevel(factor(sample.description$Myco), ref = "Non-Myco")
sample.description$Trt <- relevel(factor(sample.description$Trt), ref = "Control")

design <- model.matrix(~ Myco * Trt, data = sample.description)
fit <- glmQLFit(y, design)
```


Effect 1: The Mycorrhiza Effect (Baseline)
glmQLFTest(fit, coef = 2)
Tests: Mycorrhiza vs. Non-Myco in the Control treatment.

Effect 2: The Treatment Effect (Baseline)
glmQLFTest(fit, coef = 3)
Tests: Treatment vs. Control in the Non-Myco plants.

Effect 3: The Interaction (Synergy)
glmQLFTest(fit, coef = 4)
Tests: Is the treatment response different in Myco plants vs Non-Myco plants?
